title: Claude Code plugin manifest
description: Schema for plugin.json files in this marketplace. Mirrors the install-time validation that `claude plugin install` performs, so any manifest that passes here is installable. Extension keys such as `framework_metadata` are permitted via additionalProperties.

name.description: Plugin identifier. Must match the directory name and the marketplace.json entry.

version.description: Semver-compatible version string, e.g. 0.1.0. Pattern enforces the semver 2.0.0 grammar (major.minor.patch with optional prerelease and build-metadata segments).

author.description: Author metadata. Must be an object — bare strings are rejected by `claude plugin install`.
